classes.name: Specification evidence
classes.purpose: Defines an intended public contract, model, interface, or boundary.
classes.authority: Authoritative for the stated design and boundary only.
classes.integrityMethod: Versioned repository path and any published content hash or revision.
classes.freshnessModel: Bound to its reviewed date and superseded by a later identified revision.
classes.expiry: No automatic expiry, but it cannot be treated as evidence of an unstated implementation revision.
classes.retention: Retain the versioned source and its documented replacement path.
classes.revocation: Mark a withdrawn specification as superseded or archived and direct readers to its replacement.
classes.supersession: A replacement must identify the older record or route it replaces.
classes.disclosureBoundary: May describe public contracts without exposing secrets, private topology, or customer data.
classes.verificationMethod: Review the named versioned source and its stated scope.

classes.name: Test evidence
classes.purpose: Records a repeatable check of a declared behavior or fixture.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the exercised behavior, environment, and result scope.
classes.integrityMethod: Versioned test source, fixture identifiers, and retained output when published.
classes.freshnessModel: Fresh only for the tested revision and declared environment.
classes.expiry: Expires as evidence for a changed implementation or unrepeatable environment.
classes.retention: Retain the test source, fixtures, and any disclosed result receipt.
classes.revocation: Invalidate a result when its fixture, environment, or test contract is found unsound.
classes.supersession: A newer test result supersedes only the same named behavior and scope.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Do not expose protected inputs, secrets, or customer data in public fixtures.
classes.verificationMethod: Run the named test under its documented prerequisites and inspect its result.

classes.name: Build evidence
classes.purpose: Connects a generated artifact or tool capture to a declared source revision or build process.
classes.authority: Authoritative for the named artifact or version capture, not for a broader runtime state.
classes.integrityMethod: Content hashes, source revision bindings, and deterministic generation checks where available.
classes.freshnessModel: Fresh only for the declared source revision and captured environment.
classes.expiry: Expires when the underlying source, lock, or environment changes.
classes.retention: Retain the source revision, generated artifact, and applicable digest.
classes.revocation: Invalidate a binding when a digest mismatch or non-deterministic generation issue is found.
classes.supersession: A later capture supersedes only the same artifact and source scope.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Never publish build secrets, private environment values, or provider internals.
classes.verificationMethod: Recreate or inspect the declared artifact against the named source revision.

classes.name: Release evidence
classes.purpose: Binds a public release record to listed artifacts and stated validation scope.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the disclosed static artifact set and stated release boundary.
classes.integrityMethod: Source commit, content digests, and a release-manifest record.
classes.freshnessModel: Point-in-time at the release record timestamp and invalid after a different release is promoted.
classes.expiry: Expires as a statement about the current release after supersession or rollback.
classes.retention: Retain the release manifest and audit receipt for the release lifetime.
classes.revocation: Withdraw or mark the release record superseded after a failed audit or rollback.
classes.supersession: A later release record replaces the prior record for the canonical public artifact set.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Does not disclose provider credentials, project internals, or protected runtime surfaces.
classes.verificationMethod: Compare the named release record with the observed public artifact set.

classes.name: Runtime evidence
classes.purpose: Describes a bounded observation of an executing system in a declared environment.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the recorded environment, time, and measured signal.
classes.integrityMethod: Authenticated collection, timestamping, and integrity checks appropriate to the runtime source.
classes.expiry: Expires at the stated freshness or monitoring window.
classes.retention: Retain only the permitted receipt and metadata required for the stated scope.
classes.revocation: Invalidate the receipt if its collector or identity binding is compromised.
classes.supersession: Newer observations replace older observations only for the same signal and environment.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Must not disclose private endpoints, secrets, personal data, or protected topology.
classes.verificationMethod: Validate collector identity, timestamp, and measurement contract.

classes.name: Operational evidence
classes.purpose: Records a declared operating process, ownership boundary, or service state.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the declared operating boundary and review date.
classes.integrityMethod: Versioned source, owner, review date, and route or document binding.
classes.freshnessModel: Reviewed at the stated cadence and revised when operating scope changes.
classes.expiry: Expires when the stated operating boundary changes or is superseded.
classes.retention: Retain current and superseded public operating records.
classes.revocation: Mark an operating record superseded when its process or boundary no longer applies.
classes.supersession: A newer named operating record replaces the prior scope.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Public records exclude secrets, private incident detail, and customer-specific operations.
classes.verificationMethod: Inspect the named owner, source, review date, and stated limitation.

classes.name: Observation evidence
classes.purpose: Describes a bounded public observation with declared source and failure semantics.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the disclosed observation field set and time.
classes.integrityMethod: Declared signature, key metadata, canonicalization, and freshness controls where present.
classes.freshnessModel: Explicitly timestamped and subject to the route's freshness state.
classes.expiry: Expires when stale, unavailable, or outside the declared observation window.
classes.retention: Retain only public observations and non-secret verification metadata as permitted.
classes.revocation: Reject invalid signatures, revoked keys, or invalid observation transitions.
classes.supersession: A later signed observation replaces an earlier observation only for the declared feed.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Never exposes signing keys, private gateway addresses, peers, or administrative controls.
classes.verificationMethod: Validate the declared public key, signature contract, and freshness semantics.

classes.name: Incident evidence
classes.purpose: Records a scoped issue report, impact statement, and handling path.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the explicitly recorded issue and handling scope.
classes.integrityMethod: Case identifier, protected evidence handling, and documented reproduction scope.
classes.freshnessModel: Changes as investigation, remediation, or disclosure state changes.
classes.expiry: Not a standing service-health assertion after the incident is closed or superseded.
classes.retention: Retain under the applicable operational and disclosure boundary.
classes.revocation: Correct or withdraw a report when evidence is found invalid or misattributed.
classes.supersession: A corrected report replaces earlier impact or remediation statements.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Protect secrets, customer information, and exploitable details until disclosure is approved.
classes.verificationMethod: Review the issue scope, reproduction evidence, and disclosure status.

classes.name: Independent reproduction evidence
classes.purpose: Records an independently repeated result against a stated procedure and scope.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the reproduced procedure, artifact, and declared environment.
classes.integrityMethod: Independent actor identity, versioned procedure, and retained result receipt.
classes.freshnessModel: Bound to the reproduced revision and environment.
classes.expiry: Expires for changed artifacts or environments.
classes.retention: Retain the reproduction procedure and permitted receipt.
classes.revocation: Invalidate where the independence or reproduction procedure is compromised.
classes.supersession: A later independent reproduction may replace the prior result for the same scope.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Do not disclose protected inputs or third-party confidential materials.
classes.verificationMethod: Review the independent actor, procedure, inputs, and result boundary.

classes.name: External review evidence
classes.purpose: Records an externally scoped review with a named method and conclusion boundary.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the named reviewer, scope, method, and finding date.
classes.integrityMethod: Reviewer identity, immutable report reference, and scope/version binding.
classes.freshnessModel: Bound to the reviewed version and report date.
classes.expiry: Expires as a statement about materially changed systems or scope.
classes.retention: Retain the report, scope, and any response or supersession record.
classes.revocation: Correct or revoke if reviewer independence, scope, or report integrity fails.
classes.supersession: A later review replaces prior conclusions only for overlapping scope.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Publish only approved findings without exposing protected systems or confidential report material.
classes.verificationMethod: Verify reviewer identity, scope, method, version, and report integrity.

classes.name: Regulatory or compliance evidence
classes.purpose: Records a regulator, registry, or compliance-source fact with stated jurisdiction and date.
classes.authority: Authoritative only for the cited authority, jurisdiction, record date, and stated fact.
classes.integrityMethod: Official authority reference, lookup identifier, and retained verification date.
classes.freshnessModel: Bound to the authority's current record and the stated verification date.
classes.expiry: Expires when the authority's status changes or the record is no longer current.
classes.retention: Retain permitted record references and verification dates.
classes.revocation: Correct the public record when the cited authority changes or rejects the stated fact.
classes.supersession: A later authority record replaces an earlier cited status.
classes.disclosureBoundary: Do not publish private registry material, personal data, or legal advice.
classes.verificationMethod: Check the named official authority and the source record's verification date.

evidenceRecords.scope: Public company identity record with named registry sources and an explicit verification date.
